name: StreamingText
description: Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

api.name: StreamingText
api.description: Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

parameters.name: Prose
parameters.description: Applies Tailwind Typography (prose) styling to the rendered output. Meaningful on its own only when Markdown (or a consumer's own markup via MarkdownRenderer) produces real block/inline elements for the prose styles to target.

parameters.name: Markdown
parameters.description: Renders Text as markdown instead of plain text. Uses MarkdownRenderer when supplied, otherwise a built-in dependency-free CommonMark subset (headings, lists, bold/italic, inline + fenced code, links, blockquotes). Incremental fade-in is disabled in this mode because markdown re-parses the whole string each update.

parameters.name: MarkdownRenderer
parameters.description: Optional render hook: converts the raw markdown Text into a MarkupString. Supply this to plug in a full renderer (Markdig, etc.). The delegate is responsible for producing SAFE HTML — sanitise untrusted input before returning. Ignored unless Markdown is true.

examples.title: Static Text
examples.code: <StreamingText Text="Blazor is a framework for building interactive web UIs using C# instead of JavaScript." IsStreaming="false" />

examples.title: Streaming Simulation
examples.code:
<StreamingText Text="@_text" IsStreaming="@_streaming" />

@code {
    private string _text = string.Empty;
    private bool _streaming;

    // Update _text incrementally as tokens arrive from your AI API
}

examples.title: Markdown Mode
examples.code:
<StreamingText Text="@_text" Markdown="true" Prose="true" IsStreaming="false" />

@code {
    // _text holds markdown — headings, **bold**, *italic*, lists, `code`
    private string _text = "## Getting started\n\nBlazor lets you build web UIs with **C#**.";
}

examples.title: With Blinking Cursor While Streaming
examples.code:
<StreamingText Text="@_text" IsStreaming="@_streaming" />
<!-- IsStreaming=true shows a blinking cursor at the end -->
<!-- Set IsStreaming=false when the response is complete -->

mdSummary:
# StreamingText

Token-by-token streaming text renderer for AI responses.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** AI
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/streaming-text

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| StreamingText | Text | `string?` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | IsStreaming | `bool` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | Prose | `bool` | `` | Applies Tailwind Typography (prose) styling to the rendered output. Meaningful on its own only when Markdown (or a consumer's own markup via MarkdownRenderer) produces real block/inline elements for the prose styles to target. |
| StreamingText | Markdown | `bool` | `` | Renders Text as markdown instead of plain text. Uses MarkdownRenderer when supplied, otherwise a built-in dependency-free CommonMark subset (headings, lists, bold/italic, inline + fenced code, links, blockquotes). Incremental fade-in is disabled in this mode because markdown re-parses the whole string each update. |
| StreamingText | MarkdownRenderer | `Func<string, MarkupString>?` | `` | Optional render hook: converts the raw markdown Text into a MarkupString. Supply this to plug in a full renderer (Markdig, etc.). The delegate is responsible for producing SAFE HTML — sanitise untrusted input before returning. Ignored unless Markdown is true. |
| StreamingText | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| StreamingText | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- (none)

## Events
- (none)

## Sub-components
- (none)

## Cascading values it expects

## Keyboard

## Example

